title: primula veris subsp. macrocalyx
intro: Primula veris subsp. macrocalyx, also known as the large-leaved cowslip, is a subspecies of Primula veris, a type of flowering plant in the primrose family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating coughs, colds, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Primula veris subsp. macrocalyx include its ability to help alleviate bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory conditions, as well as its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
